apps.name: Buge App Manager
apps.changelog:
**9.57.105**

**Added** ✨
- Added support for custom Shizuku provider package name

**Contributors of this version:**
None
apps.short_description: An application management tool that obtains adb shell privileges via Shizuku
apps.description:
Buge App Manager is a powerful Android utility application designed for advanced app and permission management. Built with Material Design 3, it offers a modern and intuitive interface for granular control over your device.

Features

- Shizuku Integration: Operates with Shizuku authorization for elevated control without requiring root.

- App Management: Browse and manage both user-installed and system applications with ease.

- Material Design 3 UI: Clean, system-themed interface that follows the latest Android design guidelines.

Permission Manager

- View and modify app permissions by category
- Supported categories include: Microphone, Camera, Location access, Notifications, Phone & Contacts, Storage and other
- Filter permissions by granted or denied status
- Batch permission operations for multiple apps

Privacy & Security

- Quickly identify which apps have access to sensitive permissions
- Optimize your device's security posture with clear permission insights

Note: Shizuku is required for advanced permission management features.

License: GNU General Public License v3.0

apps.name: Code Integrator

1.4.3

Added
- Added support for four new languages

Fixed
- Fixed issue where Code Integrator could not be used
apps.short_description: Merge source code files from any project into a single text file for analysis, backup, and sharing
apps.description:
Code Integrator is an Android utility app that merges source code files from any project folder into a single, well-organized text file. It simplifies code analysis, backup, and sharing by consolidating your entire project's source into one portable file.

Features

- Merge all source files into one text file for easy review and sharing
- Project tree structure viewer with visual hierarchy
- Custom file type filters to exclude images, audio, video, archives, binaries, and more
- Auto-exclude build and .gradle folders to keep output clean
- File size ranking to quickly spot large files
- Material Design 3 UI with light and dark theme support

Supported File Types

Included: .java, .kt, .xml, .gradle, .txt, .md, .json, .sh, .bat, .gitignore
Excluded by default: .jpg, .png, .mp3, .mp4, .zip, .exe, .pdf, .doc, .class, and more

Output Format

The generated file includes:
- Project tree structure with folder and file icons
- Complete content of each text file
- File size ranking for quick identification of large files

Note: Storage permission is required to access project folders.

License: GNU General Public License v3.0

apps.name: NGS-KG+
apps.changelog:
- 播放引擎从 just_audio 换成了 media_kit
- UI 全面重写，新增侧边栏导航、MD3 动效
- 新增播放队列管理、歌词增强、歌单收藏与多选操作
- 集成 Navidrome 服务端支持

· Replaced the playback engine from just_audio to media_kit for better performance and more features
· Completely redesigned UI with new sidebar navigation, MD3 animations, and theming system
· Added playback queue management, enhanced lyrics display, playlist favorites, and multi-select operations
· Integrated Navidrome server support
apps.description:
这是 NGS-KG+ 基于 Nightcord 2.0.0 的 Android 预览版本。

本版本更新内容：
- 播放引擎从 just_audio 换成了 media_kit，底层能力更强
- UI 全面重写：新的侧边栏导航、MD3 动效和主题系统
- 新增播放队列管理、歌词增强、歌单收藏与多选操作
- 集成了 Navidrome 服务端支持

This is the Android preview version of NGS-KG+ based on Nightcord 2.0.0.

New in this version:

· Replaced the playback engine from just_audio to media_kit for better performance and more features
· Completely redesigned UI with new sidebar navigation, MD3 animations, and theming system
· Added playback queue management, enhanced lyrics display, playlist favorites, and multi-select operations
· Integrated Navidrome server support
